body: PT Triputra Agro Persada Tbk (TAPG) announced a dividend income of IDR 19.35 billion from its subsidiary, PT Dwiwira Lestari Jaya, with no material impact on its financial performance. In the second quarter of 2024, TAPG reported revenue of IDR 2.16 trillion and net profit of IDR 595.54 billion, with total revenue and net profit for the first semester reaching IDR 4.08 trillion and IDR 966.35 billion, respectively.
title: Triputra Agro Persada's subsidiary Tapg secures IDR 19.35 billion dividend income from PT Dwiwira Lestari Jaya.

body: PT Djasa Ubersakti Tbk has secured a new contract worth IDR 94.56 billion for the Central Papua civil servant apparatus flat project, with a 330-day effective duration. Despite reporting a loss of IDR 19.63 billion and IDR 24.61 billion before taxes in the first half of 2024, the company remains optimistic about completing the project on time and to the best quality.
title: PT Djasa Ubersakti secures IDR 94.56 billion contract for Central Papua civil servant flat project.

body: Star Energy Geothermal, a subsidiary of PT Barito Renewables Energy, will invest USD 346 million to boost energy capacity at several geothermal plants, increasing installed capacity by 102.6 megawatt and reinforcing its position as a renowned power plant company. The expansion will involve installing additional capacity at Salak, Wayang Windu, and Drajat units, resulting in increased energy capacity of 278.9 MW, 428.2 MW, and 281.5 MW, respectively.
title: Star Energy Geothermal to Invest USD 346 Million to Boost Capacity of Several Geothermal Plants in Indonesia

body: Foreign investor Sight Investment Company Pte Limited acquired 5.85 billion shares of PT Siloam International Hospitals Tbk, increasing its ownership from 10.4% to 55.4% and becoming the controlling shareholder. Meanwhile, other notable transactions included PT Indocement Tunggal Prakarsa Tbk purchasing 500,000 of its own shares, and PT Yulie Sekuritas Tbk selling 930,400 shares of PT Dyandra Media International Tbk.
title: Siloam Hospitals sees significant changes in ownership structure as foreign investors buy and sell shares.

body: The Jakarta Composite Stock Price Index (IHSG) closed at 7,829.14 on Wednesday, declining from its opening level of 7,873.39, despite some indices such as LQ45, IDX30, and IDX80 showing gains. Several stocks, including PT Indofood CBP Sukses Makmur TBK and PT Bank Central Asia TBK, strengthened, while others, including PT Indofood Sukses Makmur TBK and PT Barito Pacific TBK, corrected.
title: Jakarta Composite Stock Price Index Closes at 7,829.14 after Decline Throughout the Day

body: PT Bukit Makmur Mandiri Utama (BUMA) is offering a second bond issuance in 2024 with a total principal of IDR 1 trillion, which will help diversify funding, manage debts, and support long-term business strategy. The proceeds will be used to pay off IDR 422.91 billion of Bond I 2023 and allocate 28.86% for capital expenditure, with a credit rating of "A+" from Pemeringkat Efek Indonesia Fitch Ratings.
title: Buma Offers IDR 1 Trillion Bond to Diversify Funding and Manage Debt

body: PT United Tractors TBK, a heavy equipment distributor, has revised its Komatsu sales projection to 4500 units, a 12.5% increase from its initial target of 4000 units, driven by growing demand from the mining industry. Despite a 29% year-on-year decline in Komatsu sales in July 2024, the company remains optimistic, with revenue reaching IDR 64.5 trillion, a 6% year-on-year decrease, and plans to distribute two new Komatsu units to cater to different mining needs.
title: PT United Tractors Revises Up Komatsu Sales Projection to 4500 Units Amid Mining Industry Growth

body: PT Verona Indah Pictures Tbk plans to raise up to IDR 218.72 billion through its initial public offering of 1.12 billion shares, priced between IDR 190 and IDR 195 per share. The company will allocate approximately 7.33% of the IPO proceeds to acquire land and a building in West Jakarta, with the remaining portion going towards working capital.
title: PT Verona Indah Pictures to Raise Up to IDR 218.72 Billion in IPO with 1.12 Billion Shares Offering

body: PT Estetika Tata Tiara Tbk will increase its capital by IDR 10.51 billion, generated from capitalization of stock premium, resulting in an issued paid-up capital of 7.18 billion shares, comprising 1.88 billion series A shares and 5.30 billion series B shares. The capital increase follows a bonus share distribution to shareholders, with a ratio of 500:11, where owners of 500 old shares will receive 11 bonus shares, valued at IDR 68 per share.
title: PT Estetika Tata Tiara to increase capital by IDR 10.51 billion through capitalization of stock premium.

body: PT Astra Sedaya Finance is issuing a shelf-registration bond worth IDR 2.6 trillion, part of a larger IDR 12 trillion target, with two series of bonds offering tenors of 370 days and 36 months with coupons of 6.45% and 6.70%, respectively. The proceeds will be used to fund working capital, including investments, multi-financing, operating leases, and other financing purposes, aligning with the company's business segment.
title: Astra Sedaya Finance Issues IDR 2.6 Trillion Bond as Part of IDR 12 Trillion Shelf Registration

body: PT Petrindo Jaya Kreasi Tbk has secured a IDR 700 billion term loan facility from PT Bank Mandiri Tbk, which will be used to fill a cash flow gap, with repayment due in 5 years. The company has also obtained a separate IDR 775 billion loan from PT Bank Negara Indonesia Tbk for general corporate activities, and as of H1 2024, it had total assets of USD 1.15 billion, liabilities of USD 829.81 million, and equity of USD 327.28 million.
title: PT Petrindo Jaya Kreasi obtains IDR 700 billion term loan facility from PT Bank Mandiri to fill cash flow gap.

body: PT Industri dan Perdagangan Bintraco Dharma Tbk has increased its capital investment in PT Sarana Bangun Raharja, a subsidiary in the automotive sector, through PT Bangun Rahmat Sejahtera, which owns 95% of SBR's shares. The additional capital is expected to boost operational activities, strengthen the company's network structure in the automotive sector, and lead to overall financial performance improvement, reflected in comprehensive profit growth.
title: PT Industri dan Perdagangan Bintraco Dharma increases capital investment in subsidiary PT Sarana Bangun Raharja to boost automotive sector operations.

body: PT Sarana Menara Nusantara Tbk (TOWR) plans to conduct a capital raise through a preemptive rights issue to collect fresh funds of up to IDR 9 trillion, with proceeds to be used to pay loans and enhance working capital for the company and its subsidiary. Assuming an offering price of IDR 845 per share, the estimated number of shares to be issued will reach 10.65 billion shares.
title: PT Sarana Menara Nusantara to Conduct Rights Issue to Raise Up to IDR 9 Trillion for Loan Repayment and Working Capital.

body: Foreign investors sold a net 45.60 million shares, with the largest sale being 1.51 billion shares of PT Goto Gojek Tokopedia TBK, while the top purchases included 228.92 million shares of PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia TBK and 132.70 million shares of PT Maharaksa Biru Energi TBK. The net foreign volume was slightly negative, with foreign selling volume at 3 billion shares and foreign buying volume at 2.95 billion shares.
title: Foreign investors sell 3 billion shares, buy 2.95 billion shares in Indonesian market.

body: PT Harimas Tunggal Perkasa increased its stake in PT Impack Pratama Industri TBK to 18.86% by purchasing 3.1 billion shares, while RR Capital Group PTE Ltd acquired 283 million shares of PT Panca Global Kapital TBK to boost its stake to 37%. Meanwhile, several other companies, including PT Indocement Tunggal Prakarsa TBK and PT Lautan Luas TBK, engaged in share buybacks, and some investors reduced their stakes in various companies, resulting in changes to their share percentages.
title: Multiple Indonesian companies engage in share acquisitions and divestments, altering their stakes in various industries.

body: Alibaba Group is partnering with GoTo Group to provide Alibaba Cloud services, aiming to enhance operational efficiency, lower costs, and promote innovation in Indonesia's digital economy over the next five years. The collaboration is expected to drive long-term growth, increase digital competitiveness, and provide added value to shareholders, with GoTo's cloud services set to migrate to Alibaba Cloud by October 2024.
title: Alibaba Group to Provide Cloud Services to PT Goto Gojek Tokopedia TBK for Next Five Years

body: PT Bank Negara Indonesia Tbk has completed a share buyback of 40.51 million shares, with the acquired shares to be used for the management employee stock option plan program, which is expected to boost investor trust. The bank's price-to-book value has increased from 1.2 to 1.4, and its share price has surged from IDR 4,400 to IDR 5,625 per share, following the allocation of IDR 905 billion for the buyback.
title: Bank Negara Indonesia Completes Share Buyback of 40.51 Million Shares for Employee Stock Option Plan

body: The Indonesian government's securities auction today received IDR 63.7 trillion in incoming bids, with the SPN12250918 series attracting the highest amount of bids at IDR 4.26 trillion and the FR0103 series recording the highest incoming bids at IDR 26.19 trillion. The total awarded amount secured by the government in this auction reached IDR 22 trillion, bringing the total accumulated bids to IDR 985 trillion and awarded amount to IDR 391.61 trillion since the beginning of the year.
title: Indonesian Government Securities Auction Sees IDR 63.7 Trillion in Incoming Bids

body: PT Solusi Sinergi Digital Tbk's subsidiary, PT Integrasi Jaringan Ekosistem, has partnered with 50 internet service providers to provide internet infrastructure to 25 million household users, aiming to generate high-quality internet connectivity across Java and beyond. The company has invested in a 7,000-kilometer fibre optic backbone, 58 edge data centers, and a 64 Gbps bandwidth capacity, positioning itself to handle future connectivity needs and provide reliable and affordable internet services.
title: PT Solusi Sinergi Digital's subsidiary partners with 50 internet service providers to bring high-quality internet connectivity to 25 million households in Indonesia.

body: PT Aneka Tambang (ANTM) has partnered with two regional state-owned enterprises to establish joint ventures for nickel mining development in the Pongkeru block, East Luwu, South Sulawesi, aiming to optimize nickel potential and generate long-term added value for the national nickel industry. ANTM will hold a majority shareholder portion in the joint venture, although the exact percentage has not been disclosed.
title: PT Aneka Tambang partners with regional state-owned enterprises to establish joint ventures for nickel mining development in South Sulawesi.

body: PT Adhi Karya Tbk secured new contracts worth IDR 13.6 trillion until August 2024, with 43% coming from building projects and 31% from water resources projects. The company's total assets reached IDR 36.19 trillion and total equity IDR 9.25 trillion as of July 2024, with 56% of new contracts funded by the government's budget.
title: Adhi Karya Secures New Contracts Worth IDR 13.6 Trillion Until August 2024

body: Foreign investors purchased a net volume of 403.71 million shares, with significant buys in PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (249.58 million shares) and PT Bumi Resources Tbk (77.71 million shares), among others. Meanwhile, notable sales included PT Bank KB Bukopin Tbk (96.24 million shares), PT Adhi Kartiko Pratama Tbk (85.42 million shares), and PT Lippo Karawaci Tbk (36.05 million shares).
title: Foreign investors purchase 3.62 billion shares of PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk, leading to a net foreign volume surplus of 403.71 million shares.

body: PT Garuda Maintenance Facility Aero Asia Tbk's net profit surged 556.19% year-on-year to USD 13.30 million in the first half of 2024, driven by a 30.12% increase in revenue to USD 216.47 million, with growth seen in reparation overhaul, maintenance, and other operations segments. The company's profit before taxes also rose to USD 13.28 million, up from USD 5.22 million in the same period last year.
title: PT Garuda Maintenance Facility Aero Asia's Net Profit Surges 556% in First Half of 2024
